hero.title: Southern Institute for Social
hero.description: We are a leading institution in scientific research, technology transfer, and high-quality human resources development for society.

timeline.title: Development Journey
timeline.description: From establishment to the present, we have been committed to the mission of developing social resources.

items.title: Establishment
items.description: Beginning the journey with a mission to develop human resources for society.

items.title: Expansion
items.description: Expanding research, training, and technology transfer services.

cta.title: Partner with Us
cta.description: We are always looking for cooperation opportunities with domestic and international organizations in the fields of scientific research, training, and technology transfer.

visionMission.title: Vision & Mission
visionMission.visionText: To become a leading institution in scientific research, technology transfer, and high-quality human resources development in Vietnam and Southeast Asia.
visionMission.missionText: Contributing to the sustainable development of society by providing high-quality human resources training, scientific research, and technology transfer solutions.
visionMission.integrityDesc: Operating with transparency, ethics, and social responsibility.
visionMission.qualityDesc: Continuously improving training quality and research to meet the highest standards.
visionMission.innovationDesc: Applying new technologies and creative thinking in all activities.

structure.title: Organizational Structure
structure.description: Our team of experienced professionals dedicated to excellence in research, training, and development.

advisory.title: Advisory Board
advisory.description: Our advisory board consists of distinguished experts and professionals providing strategic guidance for the institute.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.description: We collaborate with leading organizations domestically and internationally in scientific research, training, and technology transfer.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: SISRD provides comprehensive services in scientific research, technology transfer, safety inspection, and quality management.
services.ourTeam: Our team of experts is ready to assist you

training.title: Training Programs
training.description: Explore our comprehensive training programs in occupational safety, quality management, and professional development.
